title: Araghchi admits nuclear enriched uranium deadlock with US — 'almost in a deadlock'; postponed to later stages; Russia's offer to store uranium mentioned
snippet: Iranian FM Abbas Araghchi admitted that talks with Washington over enriched uranium have reached a deadlock. Both sides agreed to postpone the nuclear issue to later stages. 'It is not under discussion, it's not under negotiation, but we will come to that subject in later stages.' He mentioned Russia's offer to store Iran's enriched uranium and said consultations would happen when they reach that stage. Araghchi stated Iran 'never wanted nuclear weapons' and doubted US seriousness. Trump referenced 'nuclear dust' — enriched uranium buried beneath bombed sites.
tag_reason: 핵 교착 공식 인정과 후순위 합의는 이전 소스에 없음. 5/10-11 핵 역제안 보도와 구별되는 새로운 '교착 인정' 발언.
